result.summary: The page shows a few layout problems: some content is clipped on the right edge, and the fixed bottom navigation overlaps the last row of game tiles, making part of the content hard to see or reach.

issues.description: The game grid is cut off on the right side, with the third column only partially visible in multiple sections.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid or container width so cards fit within the viewport, or make the section clearly scrollable with proper padding and overflow handling.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar overlaps the content area, obscuring the lower game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding/margin to the page content equal to the height of the fixed footer, or switch to a non-overlapping sticky layout.

issues.description: The top category row is clipped on the right, leaving the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the category chips have enough horizontal space or provide clearer scrolling affordance and spacing at the edges.
